Efficiency

VRAM Capacity Analysis

With 24GB VRAM, you can run:

  • Llama 3 70B (Q4) or Mixtral 8x7B (Q4)
  • Llama 3 8B (FP16) + Stable Diffusion XL simultaneously
  • Llama 3 8B (Q8) or CodeLlama 13B (Q4)

LLM Inference Speed

Expected performance with Llama 3 8B: 52 tokens/sec
